case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MATTHEW GREEN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, MATTHEW SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002841), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, MATTHEW
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID BY PLAINTIFF ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT (TRANSACTION ID # 100118923) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN, MATTHEW
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100219548)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-30-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE MAR-16-2021 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100118923) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
